# Learn Codebase: Elite Studio ‚Äî Progress

Scope: `skyyrose/elite_studio/` read IN FULL (main thread, so claude-mem captures observations).
~39k lines py + arch docs + golden specs. ~500k tokens ‚Üí compaction certain, likely multi-session.
Skip: `logs/runs/*.json` (~350 telemetry), `data/*.metadata.json`. Read everything else.

Resume rule: start at first unchecked cluster. Don't re-read checked ones.

**STATUS: COMPLETE (all C0‚ÄìC15 read in full).** Capture verified against claude-mem worker source (`worker-service.cjs`): observations are generated by the **PostToolUse matcher="*" `observation` hook** (path-agnostic ‚Äî sends piped `toolResponse`, NOT a `file_path` re-read; no `.txt` filter). `jk()` only strips privacy markers `["private","claude-mem-context","system_instruction","persisted-output",...]`. C0‚ÄìC12 captured via Read-on-source; C13/C14/C15 captured via Read-of-persisted-`.txt` (clean of strip markers). NB: raw `cat` Bash results ARE stripped (wrapped in `<persisted-output>`), so the follow-up `Read` of each saved `.txt` is what actually captured C13‚Äì15. Observation generation is async (post-tool/Stop) ‚Äî none of today's observations are queryable mid-session; that's expected, not a failure.

**RESUME ORDER (advisor, value-first):** C15 golden BEFORE C14 tests. Golden = highest-value canon; tests = lowest comprehension density. Order: C15 ‚Üí C13 ‚Üí C14.
C15 partial: 9 active/jersey golden `placement.md` already read (br-011, br-003, br-006, br-008, br-009, br-010, br-012, br-014, br-015). Remaining C15 = kids-*, lh-*, sg-* SKUs + per-dir CLAUDE.md/logos.
C14 by relevance (skip rote test_smoke): test_dual_vision_gate, test_tripo_dispatch_guards, test_purge_hallucinations, ghost-mannequin tests, synthesis/tests/.

## Notes / synthesis per cluster

### Two execution engines (root architecture)
- **Legacy** `coordinator.Coordinator` ‚Äî linear vision‚Üígen‚ÜíQC‚Üícomposite (4 step). `Coordinator(vision,generator,quality,compositor,logger)`.
- **New** `graph.build_graph()` LangGraph StateGraph (the `--graph` CLI flag). `cli.py` argparse, 12 commands: produce, produce-batch, status, composite, produce-async, job-status/result, dlq-list/retry, worker, create (Creative Ops Hub), catalog.
- `__init__.py` lazy-loads coordinator+graph (so `fashion.context` imports stay light).
- `models.py` = all frozen dataclasses (immutable stage results): ProductData, VisionAnalysis, SynthesizedVision, GenerationResult, QualityVerification, CompositorResult, TryOnResult, ProductionResult + Layer2 (EnrichedPrompt, UpscaleResult, ColorCorrectionResult, SafetyResult, Variant*) + PhaseB2 (DualAgentResult, PreflightResult, GhostMannequinCompositeResult).

### C1 core infra
- `config.py` ‚Äî 5-layer .env load (.env‚Üíparent .env‚Üígemini/.env‚Üí.env.hf‚Üí.env.secrets, secrets wins via override=True). Model IDs re-exported from `llm/model_ids.py` (NEVER hardcode). Validators: validate_catalog_readers/validate_dossier_readers (4-reader divergence: core.catalog_loader, elite_studio.catalog, scripts.nano_banana, PHP), verify_no_orphans, validate_pipeline_models (deploy-time drift). Canonical CSV = wordpress-theme/skyyrose-flagship/data/skyyrose-catalog.csv.
- `catalog.py` ‚Äî `Catalog` SoT loader (CSV or YAML). ProductEntry frozen+__post_init__ validated. get_product_with_dossier delegates to skyyrose.core.dossier_loader (hard-fail DossierMissingError, branding_spec NOT a fallback). Jersey patch sport map.
- `brand.py` ‚Äî BrandConfig from assets/brand/brand.yaml (tagline_active, collections, palettes hex-validated).
- `budget.py` ‚Äî RunBudget thread-safe ($25 default, ELITE_STUDIO_BUDGET_USD). check-then-spend (ensure_within_budget pre-check, spend after success). _lock is ClassVar (shared cross-instance ‚Äî known low-risk).
- `sku_resolver.py` ‚Äî sanitize_sku (path-traversal/injection allowlist), resolve_sku (accessory‚ÜíNone skip, jersey set br-003/008-012/014-015, br-013 retired), verify_tripo_region (free balance probe pre-paid-dispatch).
- `validation.py` ‚Äî 2-tier: structural validators raise ValueError; referential returns Violation list. IntegrityError(strict).
- `utils.py` ‚Äî pure: load_product_data, get_reference_image_path (4-priority lookup, source-products only), image_to_base64, resize_for_claude(1568), discover_all_skus (catalog-backed, was buggy globbing empty OVERRIDES_DIR), discover_scene_images, upload_to_fal.
- `retry.py` ‚Äî retry_on_transient (keyword detect: timeout/429/502/503/overloaded), flat delay no exp-backoff, MAX_RETRIES=2.
- `telemetry.py` ‚Äî per-stage JSONL (logs/compositor-telemetry-DATE.jsonl) + write_run_summary (logs/runs/<run_id>.json). Never raises. Stages: alpha,prompt,relight,flux,shadows,qa.
- `_observability.py` ‚Äî langfuse_config attaches CallbackHandler to LangGraph, no-op if langfuse absent.
- `forensics.py` ‚Äî write_manifest (per-render forensic: dossier hash+RAS prompt+model+audit), confirm_prompt (STOP-AND-SHOW gate, off when non-TTY/SKYYROSE_AUTO_CONFIRM=1), quarantine_path.
- `gemini_rest.py` ‚Äî direct REST Gemini (bypass SDK), key rotation, OTel traced, generate_text/analyze_vision/generate_image. (Hardened 2026-05-25: key in header not URL.)
- `fidelity.py` ‚Äî 3-check replica gate: color ŒîE CIE76 (Pillow, always), text OCR (pytesseract optional), CLIP cosine ViT-B-32 (optional). Missing deps ‚Üí available=False, never fail gate.
- `logo_registry.py` ‚Äî LogoRegistry from logo-registry.json. Centralized logos (assets/images/logos/) vs co_located_per_sku patches (products/<folder>/). image_path(sku,logo_id) ONLY authoritative resolver.
- `master_registry.py` ‚Äî Manifest of hash-pinned MasterEntry (immutable masters, reference-first: all renders derive from master not variant). register/register_pending/lock/verify. Sources: photograph/cad_render/3d_model/generative_locked.

### C2 agents (all in `agents/`)
Most are **ADK SuperAgents** (`adk.super_agents.BaseSuperAgent`, GOOGLE provider) ‚Äî `.execute()` captures "Back Data" telemetry, then real work happens. Claude EXCLUDED from vision (policy in llm/model_ids.py).
- `__init__.py` ‚Äî exports ColorCorrection/Compositor/Generator/PromptEnrichment/Quality/Safety/Tryon/Upscaling/Variant + DualVisionGate.
- `vision_agent.py` ‚Äî **DualVisionGate** (alias VisionAgent). Agent A=OpenAI gpt-4o, B=Gemini Flash. `verify_reference` (consensus: BOTH must say YES ‚Üí PreflightResult) + `analyze` (synthesize gen spec from ref image). Ref path via catalog source_files ‚Üí WP_PRODUCTS_DIR.
- `generator_agent.py` ‚Äî **GeneratorAgent** dual best-of-N: GPT-Image (A) + Gemini Pro Image RAS multi-ref (B), `_pick_winner` by byte size, writes {sku}-{view}-ghost.webp. (Past audit: budget gates were missing then wired.)
- `quality_agent.py` ‚Äî **QualityAgent** dual-judge (OpenAI + Gemini in parallel via asyncio.gather, sync calls in to_thread). Pass = min(score_a,score_b)‚â•80 AND no identity-mismatch. Two rubrics: _GHOST_QA_PROMPT (flat_lay) / _SCENE_QA_PROMPT (scene_composite). `_parse_qa_response` parses OVERALL/IDENTITY_MISMATCH/NOTES.
- `prompt_enrichment_agent.py` ‚Äî **PromptEnrichmentAgent** (NOT ADK, plain). Rule-based: spec-primacy marker + verbatim catalog branding_summary + style directives (ghost_mannequin/flat_lay) + _COLLECTION_DNA[br/lh/sg/kids] + style modifiers. Graceful on unknown SKU.
- `safety_agent.py` ‚Äî **SafetyAgent** (plain). OpenAI moderation(filename) + GPT-4o vision JSON safe-check. Unparseable ‚Üí safe (avoid false positive).
- `compositor_agent.py` ‚Äî **thin shim** re-exporting from `compositor/` subpackage (C3). Names kept at this namespace for test patching. `_maybe_apply_gate` = embedding gate ‚Üí Gemini wrapper.
- `color_correction_agent.py` ‚Äî **STUB** (success=False, returns input unchanged, labeled). Not wired.
- `variant_agent.py` ‚Äî **STUB** (success=False, base image as only variant, labeled). Not wired.
- `upscaling_agent.py` ‚Äî **UpscalingAgent** (plain, SYNC). Replicate Real-ESRGAN if token else PIL LANCZOS fallback.
- `tryon_agent.py` ‚Äî **TryOnAgent** real FASHN (FashnClient.from_env). REQUIRES public https URLs (local paths raise FashnError). `_validate_public_url` SSRF guard (blocks private/loopback/link-local IPs; known gap: no DNS resolution). Cost-incurring.
- `three_d_agent.py` ‚Äî **ThreeDAgent** (CreativeAgent). generate_replica 3-stage: (1) Meshy OR round-table tournament [ELITE_STUDIO_USE_ROUND_TABLE=1] image‚ÜíGLB, (1.5) bpy decimate cleanup, (2) headless Blender scaffold render (fallback to thumbnail/techflat), (3) FLUX synthesis (dossier-aware, replaces Gemini RAS). Hard-fails on missing dossier.
- `tripo_agent.py` ‚Äî **TripoGenerateAgent** wraps tripo3d SDK `generate_multiview_image` (image-ONLY, NO prompt/ref). ~10 credits/$0.04. KEY DANGER: template has zero anchors ‚Üí branded SKUs hallucinate (bug-096 cluster); branded path would need edit_multiview_image 2-step (not impl). STOP-AND-SHOW at scripts/tripo_dispatch.py.
- `vision_audit_agent.py` ‚Äî **VisionAuditAgent** (plain). H4 post-render gate: re-reads dossier negative_block + view-filtered branding, asks Gemini Flash Vision for violations JSON. VisionAuditResult.ok = no medium/high violations. Fail-closed on parse failure. low severity = warning only.

### C3 compositor/ subpackage (split from 1241-line monolith in H-03 audit, 2026-05-24)
`compositor_agent.py` (C2) is a thin shim re-exporting from here. 6-stage SCENE compositor (distinct from the ghost-mannequin generator path).
- `__init__.py` ‚Äî exports CompositorAgent, SCENE_LOOKBOOK, upload_to_fal.
- `orchestrator.py` ‚Äî **CompositorAgent** (SYNC API; FluxProviderMixin). `composite()` runs 6 stages w/ per-stage timing + checkpoint/resume + audit log on success OR failure:
  - S1 alpha matte (`_extract_alpha`, BRIA RMBG via rembg‚ÜíFAL fallback, 1px feather)
  - S2 FLUX prompt (`_engineer_flux_prompt`, Claude Opus vision, COMPOSITOR_OPUS_MODEL) [skipped in rasterize]
  - S3 relight (`_relight_subject`, IC-Light Replicate‚Üílibcom‚Üíalpha passthrough) [skipped in rasterize]
  - S4 composite ‚Äî branch on **ELITE_STUDIO_STAGE_D_MODE**: `kontext`(default)=FLUX inpaint via ThreadPoolExecutor parallel FAL uploads + `_composite_with_flux`; `rasterize`=deterministic PIL (align_mask_to_scene‚Üírasterize_composite, NO paid API, pixel-exact product)
  - S4.5 GIMP cleanup, S5 shadows, S5.5/6 embedding pre-gate‚ÜíGemini QA. QA_PASS_THRESHOLD=24 (sum of 3√ó0-10).
  - NOTE: orchestrator embeds its OWN copies of alpha/prompt/relight/visual_qa as methods, duplicating stage_a/b/c/g standalone modules (known dup).
- `infra.py` ‚Äî shared: _SilentLogger, upload_to_fal (fal_client.upload_file), _matte_via_fal (hosted BRIA), _file_hash/_cache_dir (renders/cache/<stage>), _b64_image_for_claude (1568px downscale), _safe_json_extract, FLUX cost constants ($0.05/0.04/0.05), **_gate_budget** (ELITE_STUDIO_STRICT_BUDGET ‚Üí hard error if no budget; else warn). _REMBG_UNAVAILABLE_SENTINEL.
- `flux_methods.py` ‚Äî **FluxProviderMixin**: `_composite_with_flux` 3-provider fallback chain fal-fill ‚Üí kontext ‚Üí replicate; each `_gate_budget` pre-check + `budget.spend()` on success. (kontext promoted to primary at one point to fix hallucinated rose cluster.)
- `lighting.py` ‚Äî SCENE_LOOKBOOK (scene slug‚Üícollection prefix), load_lighting_spec (scene.json).
- `audit.py` ‚Äî write_audit_log (JSON per run, pipeline_version compositor-v2-2026-04-30).
- `stage_a_matte.py` ‚Äî extract_alpha (standalone twin of orchestrator method).
- `stage_b_prompt.py` ‚Äî engineer_flux_prompt (get_anthropic_client injected).
- `stage_c_relight.py` ‚Äî relight_subject (Replicate‚Üílibcom‚Üíalpha; twin of orchestrator method).
- `stage_d_rasterize.py` ‚Äî **rasterize_composite** (deterministic PIL alpha-composite, pixel-exact product, cached by 3-input hash) + **align_mask_to_scene** (resize cutout matte‚Üíscene-sized mask, FILL_RATIO 0.72, VBIAS 0.55). Verified mockup = per-SKU golden photo.
- `stage_e_cleanup.py` ‚Äî gimp_pixel_cleanup (cli-anything-gimp subprocess, non-fatal passthrough).
- `stage_f_shadows.py` ‚Äî generate_shadows (PIL gaussian contact shadow, skips if subject >85% frame).
- `stage_g_visual_qa.py` ‚Äî visual_qa (Gemini rubric JSON, soft-fail to warn) + maybe_apply_gate (embedding pre-gate via quality.embedding_gate + brand_centroid; opt-in by deploying data/brand_centroid.npz; reject‚Üískip Gemini).

### C4 graph/ ‚Äî LangGraph engine (the `--graph` execution path, drop-in for Coordinator)
- `__init__.py` ‚Äî exports build_graph, GraphConfig, run_single/run_batch, EliteStudioState, create_initial_state, all node fns + edge constants.
- `state.py` ‚Äî **EliteStudioState** TypedDict (total=False) accumulator. Inputs (sku/view/style/enable_*/engine) + per-stage result slots + control flow (retry_count/max_retries/status/error/failed_step) + workflow_id + stage_timings + **budget** (RunBudget$25 default via create_initial_state) + run_summary_path. **engine** selector: "legacy"(GeneratorAgent) | "adk-render"(agents.render_pipeline 9-step ADK). extract_production_result maps state‚ÜíProductionResult.
- `builder.py` ‚Äî **GraphConfig** (frozen) toggles by layer: L2 enrich(on)/safety(on)/upscaling/color/variants; L4 human_review/visual_regression; L6 tryon; B2 ghost_mannequin preflight/composite; enable_3d. `build_graph()` ‚Üí StateGraph topology: vision‚Üí[preflight?]‚Üí[enrich?]‚Üígenerator|three_d‚Üí[safety?]‚Üíquality‚Üí[human_review?]‚Üí[retry‚Üígen]‚Üípost-chain(upscaling‚Üícolor‚Üívariants‚Üícompositor‚Üíghost_composite‚Üítryon)‚Üífinalize‚ÜíEND. enable_3d swaps generator for three_d node.
- `edges.py` ‚Äî conditional routers: after_vision/generation (success gate‚ÜíEND), after_quality (regenerate+retries‚Üígen / compositor / finalize), after_quality_v2 (L4: low classifier confidence‚Üíhuman_review), after_human_review (reject‚Üíregen), after_safety (flagged‚Üíerror_end).
- `runner.py` ‚Äî run_single (build+invoke+langfuse_config) / run_batch (compile once, per-SKU isolation, skip_existing, BATCH_DELAY 10s).
- `nodes/_shared.py` ‚Äî **run_sync** (nest_asyncio bridge), _record_cost (queue.cost_tracker), **_invoke_adk_render_engine** (P7: runs agents.render_pipeline root_agent via ADK Runner/InMemorySession, returns GenerationResult w/ qa_score/cost in metadata). Cost ceilings: gen $0.04, adk-render $0.20, 3d $0.50, compositor $0.115, tryon $0.075. Classifier confidence threshold 0.8.
- `nodes/layer1.py` ‚Äî vision/generator/quality/human_review/compositor/tryon/finalize nodes. All budget-gated (ensure_within_budget pre / spend post). generator_node branches engine legacy/adk-render. quality_node: Stage0 fidelity-audit check (audit_result from FLUX‚Üífail fast) ‚Üí ML classifier ‚Üí LLM QC only if confidence<0.8. finalize_node writes run_summary. Agents looked up via `_shim()` for test-patchability.
- `nodes/layer2.py` ‚Äî prompt_enrichment (propagates enriched spec back to vision_result), upscaling, color_correction, safety (flagged‚Üístatus=error), variant nodes.
- `nodes/ghost_mannequin.py` ‚Äî three_d_node (ThreeDAgent.generate_replica, $0.50 budget), preflight_node (DualVisionGate verify_reference, ghost_mannequin style only, passes garment_type_lock from dossier to avoid false-block), ghost_mannequin_composite_node (collar garments [_COLLAR_KEYWORDS hoodie/jacket/crewneck/bomber/windbreaker/sherpa]: neck-in composite top 20% back behind front; else passthrough).

### C5 creative/ ‚Äî Creative Operations Hub (the `create` CLI command; SEPARATE LangGraph from graph/)
Unified router for **14 intents** (CreativeIntent StrEnum: product-render, 3d-model, social-pack, product-copy, character-sheet, scene-composite, virtual-tryon, full-product-launch, design-ideation, mockup, collection-plan, tech-pack, moodboard, colorway-explore, tripo-generate).
- `state.py` ‚Äî CreativeOperationState TypedDict (intent/sku/params + per-intent result slots + fashion_context + cost/timings).
- `runner.py` ‚Äî run_creative (sync, no checkpoint) / arun_creative (async + PG checkpoint by operation_id) / resume_creative (resume from last checkpoint via ainvoke(None)).
- `router.py` ‚Äî build_creative_graph: entry‚Üíroute_intent‚Üí{specialized node}‚Üífinalize. Cached singletons (sync + checkpointed). product_render can chain to social_pack (full-product-launch).
- `edges.py` ‚Äî _INTENT_TO_NODE map (tryon/full-launch‚Üíproduct_render; mockup/tech-pack/moodboard/colorway‚Üídesign_ideation). route_intent, after_render (full-launch‚Üísocial_pack), after_any‚Üífinalize.
- `checkpointer.py` ‚Äî AsyncPostgresSaver singleton (pool, idempotent setup(), _normalize_pg_url strips +driver). None if no/sqlite DATABASE_URL ‚Üí no checkpointing.
- `nodes.py` ‚Äî entry_node (validate intent, build FashionContext via FashionContextBuilder), product_render_node (‚Üígraph.run_single), three_d_model_node (SDKGarment3DAgent opt-in ‚Üí ai_3d.ThreeDGenerationPipeline fallback; emits glb_url/usdz_url), social_pack_node (agents.SocialMediaAgent), product_copy_node (rule-based SEO copy, NOT LLM despite docstring), character_node (CharacterCreationAgent, default Rosie mascot), scene_composite_node (CompositorAgent), design_ideation_node (DesignIdeationAgent), collection_plan_node (CollectionPlanner), tripo_generate_node (TripoGenerateAgent multiview, STOP-AND-SHOW at dispatch layer), finalize_node. All nodes try/except ‚Üí never raise.

### C6 fashion/ ‚Äî Fashion Intelligence Core (ALL deterministic frozen-dataclass static data, NO LLM calls)
- `context.py` ‚Äî **FashionContextBuilder** (lazy-loads all advisors) ‚Üí FashionContext (garment/fabric/collection_dna/palette/styling/sizing/rendering_spec/trends). build() or build_from_product_catalog(sku). _infer_garment_type from product name keywords.
- `knowledge.py` ‚Äî **FashionKnowledgeBase**: 12 GarmentType + 9 FabricProperties catalogues (frozen). Each fabric has rendering_notes (e.g. sherpa CRITICAL pile texture). Default fabric per garment map. BRAND_TAGLINE="Luxury Grows from Concrete."
- `qa_rules.py` ‚Äî **FashionQA**: ~20 QARule (frozen) across fabric/color/styling/photography/brand categories. Indexed by category/garment/collection. Brand hex tolerances (Black #0A0A0A, crimson #DC143C, gold #D4AF37, rose gold #B76E79).
- `materials.py` ‚Äî **MaterialsExpert**: per-fabric RenderingSpec (texture_keywords/avoid_keywords/common_ai_errors). build_texture_prompt_segment, validate_texture. Fabric aliases.
- `colorway.py` ‚Äî **ColorAdvisor**: ~20 ColorPalette per collection (frozen). validate_color_fidelity (weighted Euclidean RGB ‚âà deltaE). get_color_prompt_notes.
- `sizing.py` ‚Äî **SizingAdvisor**: per-garment SizingGuideline + measurement size charts (inches).
- `trends.py` ‚Äî **TrendAdvisor**: 10 TrendSignal FW26/SS27 (frozen, mapped to SkyyRose DNA + specific SKUs). get_relevance_score, get_trend_notes_for_garment.
- `photography.py` ‚Äî **PhotographyDirector**: 5 PhotographyStandard (ecommerce/editorial/lookbook/lifestyle/flat-lay) w/ fabric-specific lighting notes. recommend_style (collection > garment). get_prompt_additions.
- `editorial.py` ‚Äî **EditorialDirector**: StylingRule per (garment,collection) w/ real SKU pairings + lookbook sequences per collection + flat-vs-on-model recs.
- `design/` ‚Äî agents used by creative hub: **DesignIdeationAgent** (DesignBrief‚ÜíDesignConcept w/ generation_prompt), **CollectionPlanner** (CollectionPlan: categories/hero/pricing/launch sequence per collection), **MockupGenerator** (per-view MockupResult specs), **MoodboardComposer** (location/cultural/texture refs per collection), **TechPackGenerator** (production spec: fabric/construction/branding placement/hardware/care/size chart), trend_advisor (re-export). All compose from C6 fashion modules; deterministic.

### C7 character/ ‚Äî mascot/character prompt builders (deterministic, build prompts only ‚Äî NO image gen)
- `models.py` ‚Äî frozen CharacterSpec / CharacterSheet (front/side/back/expression-grid/sprite prompts) / CharacterPose.
- `agent.py` ‚Äî **CharacterCreationAgent**: create_sheet(spec) ‚Üí 5 view prompts; generate_pose(spec,pose,sku); create_skyyrose_rosie() (canonical mascot, synced w/ frontend /api/mascot MASCOT_BASE_PROMPT). KNOWN INCONSISTENCY: `_ROSIE_SPEC` var actually holds the "Skyy" character (Love Hurts white-satin varsity outfit) per obs #74, while sprite_generator describes Rosie (Black Rose hoodie + afro puffs). Frontend /api/mascot is canonical generation system.
- `consistency.py` ‚Äî build_consistency_prompt (anchor block to prepend), extract_face_description, ConsistencyManager (register/lookup specs by name-based id, in-process).
- `sprite_generator.py` ‚Äî SpriteGenerator: 7-pose mascot sprite prompts (idle/walk_1/walk_2/wave/point/celebrate/think) + CSS animation hints. generate_skyyrose_mascot_sprites enriches w/ Rosie identity.

### C8 platform/ ‚Äî "Replica Foundry" multi-tenant SaaS layer (3D-first; "verified replica" guarantee)
Core philosophy: structurally cannot spend on unproven endpoint; no asset delivers without FidelityReport + human approval.
- `tenancy.py` ‚Äî Tenant (frozen: id, catalog_source dotted-path, reference_root=GOLDEN_DIR, enabled_engines, FidelityThresholds[visible_composite_min default 0.0=report-only]). TenantRegistry.default() seeds SkyyRose (engines={trellis}). product_root = base/<tenant>/<sku>/v<n>/.
- `capability.py` ‚Äî CapabilityMatrix.probe() FREE probes (catalog import, reference_store dir, fidelity_scorer dino+clip import, engine_local TrellisAgent.is_available). required_ok gate.
- `catalog_source.py` ‚Äî CatalogSource Protocol + SkyyRoseCatalogSource (wraps core.dossier_loader.get_product_with_dossier, DossierMissingError propagates; references() returns golden {angle:path}, legacy reference.jpg=front, missing omitted not faked).
- `service.py` ‚Äî **generate_3d** entry: resolve tenant ‚Üí probe (REQUIRED_CAPS, refuse on red ZERO spend) ‚Üí hard-states (unknown_tenant/capability_unavailable/not_requested/missing_source_image) ‚Üí inject ReplicaRunner (lazy ventures.threed.service). NOTE obs: API path (api/three_d.py) bypasses these tenant guards.
- `approval.py` ‚Äî ApprovalQueue (file-backed JSON, _ID_RE path-traversal guard). ApprovalRecord pending/approved/rejected. ONLY approved promotes.
- `delivery.py` ‚Äî deliver_approved: ONLY writer of canonical product tree, copies approved mesh to products/<tenant>/<sku>/v{next}/ (never overwrites), NotApprovedError otherwise.
- `fidelity/gate.py` ‚Äî **dispose** (pure): visible<threshold‚ÜíREJECT; inferred angle OR violation‚ÜíHUMAN_QUEUE; else PASS_PENDING_HUMAN (still needs human). **evaluate** full pipeline (gated-integration, Blender+models): resolve tenant CatalogSource, source.get(sku) hard-fail, render views‚Üíscore visible vs golden‚Üímesh sanity‚Üídispose‚ÜíFidelityReport. Inferred faces never auto-pass.
- `fidelity/metrics.py` ‚Äî composite_score = 0.5¬∑DINOv2 + 0.2¬∑CLIP + 0.3¬∑SSIM. score_view raises if no golden (refuses fabricated 1.0).
- `fidelity/render.py` ‚Äî BlenderRenderer headless GLB‚Üí5 angle PNGs (front/back/left/right/detail-1), camera_profiles/skyyrose.json (ORTHO). Render failure‚Üíinferred (HUMAN_QUEUE), never silent drop.
- `fidelity/report.py` ‚Äî FidelityReport (verdict StrEnum PASS_PENDING_HUMAN/HUMAN_QUEUE/REJECT, per-angle composite, verified/inferred angles, violations, attempts). persist w/ suffix per attempt (audit trail).
- `fidelity/scorecard.py` ‚Äî write_scorecard (per-SKU√óengine JSON + Markdown sidecar, pure aggregation).
- `fidelity/validate.py` ‚Äî hidden-face validation: BRAND_PALETTE Chebyshev tolerance, mesh_sanity_ok (reject empty/<100 faces; non-watertight acceptable+flagged), inspect_glb_geometry (trimesh).

### C9 prompts/ ‚Äî two complementary systems
**(A) Prompt Intelligence** (raw human prompt ‚Üí expert agent brief; all rule-based, no LLM):
- `analyzer.py` ‚Äî PromptAnalyzer.analyze: rule-based score 0-10, intent detection (14 intents keyword map), missing-context list (SKU/collection/garment/color/fabric/season/price/mood/platform). Deterministic.
- `chain.py` ‚Äî PromptChain 5-stage: intent classify ‚Üí context expand (smart defaults, _current_season) ‚Üí domain inject (fabric props, photography, construction) ‚Üí brand inject (COLLECTION_DNA + SkyyRose identity) ‚Üí agent optimize (action prefix / output structure).
- `enhancer.py` ‚Äî PromptEnhancer (main entry): analyze ‚Üí cache check ‚Üí chain ‚Üí cache store. Context-partitioned cache key (tenant isolation).
- `cache.py` ‚Äî PromptCache Redis-backed, Jaccard token similarity (threshold 0.75), graceful passthrough if no Redis. context_digest partitions cache (no cross-tenant leak).
- `history.py` ‚Äî PromptHistory Redis sorted-set by quality: get_best_patterns/get_failure_patterns(<0.4)/average_quality. Learning loop. Graceful no-Redis.
- `templates.py` ‚Äî PromptTemplateRegistry: 13 curated PromptTemplate per intent w/ SkyyRose brand constants (BRAND_FOUNDER="Corey Foster", COLLECTION_DNA, BRAND_COLORS) + example_output each.
**(B) Prompt Library** (`library.py`) ‚Äî versioned SoT for SHIPPED prompts from assets/prompts/registry.yaml. Prompt frozen dataclass (id `component.name.vN`, model, status production/retired/candidate, variables‚Üîplaceholders validated, impact metrics, production dates). render() strict variable match (MissingVariableError). Component registry. Structural+referential validation at load.

### C10 quality/ ‚Äî Layer 4 QA pillars + render-decision gates (CLIP/DINOv2/SSIM)
- `ml_classifier.py` ‚Äî QualityClassifier (CLIP zero-shot vs labels high-quality/low-quality/inappropriate ‚Üí ClassifierResult score+confidence). lru_cached model. Neutral fallback (0.5/0.3) if no transformers ‚Üí graph falls to LLM QC.
- `human_review.py` ‚Äî HumanReviewGate (submit_for_review ‚Üí services.approval_queue_manager; get_decision polls, 5min timeout). FAIL-SAFE: queue unavailable/timeout/error ‚Üí AUTO-APPROVE (never block prod). asyncio nesting was a fixed bug.
- `visual_regression.py` ‚Äî VisualRegressionTester SSIM vs golden (GOLDEN_DIR, per-angle thresholds front/back 0.85, three-quarter 0.78, detail 0.92). compare/compare_multi_angle, set_golden, coverage_for. HTML side-by-side report. No scikit-image ‚Üí passed=True/1.0. CANONICAL_ANGLES=(front,back,three-quarter,detail-1,detail-2).
- `load_tester.py` ‚Äî PipelineLoadTester (ThreadPoolExecutor, mocked stages, throughput/p50/p95/p99/bottleneck/cost). Measures scheduling overhead not AI latency.
- `brand_centroid.py` ‚Äî BrandCentroid build (mean embedding of approved hero shots, percentile threshold). Dual encoder clip(512d)/dino(768d, ~2x discrimination). save_centroid_with_sidecar (.npz + .metadata.json provenance: sample_paths_hash, npz_sha256).
- `embedding_gate.py` ‚Äî pre-QA gate: cosine(image, brand_centroid) ‚â• threshold ‚Üí GateVerdict accepted. Skips paid Gemini QA on off-brand (~$0.025 saved). Used by compositor stage_g.
- `clip_alignment.py` ‚Äî score_alignment text‚Üîimage cosine (>0.30 strong). Post-render gate / round-table tiebreaker.
- `render_quality.py` ‚Äî **evaluate_render** production decision: Verdict SHIP/REVIEW/KILL. Resolution hard-gate (<512px KILL) ‚Üí centroid<threshold KILL ‚Üí alignment<0.20 REVIEW ‚Üí else SHIP. combined_score 60% centroid + 40% alignment. Encoder matched to centroid model_id.
- `render_prompt_builder.py` ‚Äî Pipeline-1 product-card prompts (3-block GARMENT[CLIP-scored]/SCENE[per-collection studio]/FIDELITY). No model/scene. _infer_garment_type/color from name.
- `prompt_simplifier.py` ‚Äî simplify_for_clip (strip brand/SKU/hex/landmark‚Üígeneric). ADVISORY: empirically did NOT improve CLIP scores (-0.013); prefer original prompt for relative ranking.

### C11 queue/ ‚Äî async render worker (Redis priority queue) for `produce-async`/`worker` CLI
- `job_types.py` ‚Äî Pydantic V2: EliteStudioJobData (sku/view/priority 1-10/intent/creative_params, validators) + EliteStudioJobResult (status queued/running/success/error/skipped).
- `producer.py` ‚Äî enqueue_produce/enqueue_batch/enqueue_creative (+ async aenqueue_* variants). Wraps sdk.python.agent_sdk.task_queue.TaskQueue. job_id `elite:<sku>:<hex8>`. _run_sync bridges sync-in-async via shared pool.
- `consumer.py` ‚Äî **EliteStudioWorker** (sync, run_forever): ZPOPMAX priority queue ‚Üí atomic NX lock (dup-prevention across workers) ‚Üí EliteStudioJobData.model_validate ‚Üí run_single (graph) ‚Üí store result Redis 24h TTL + publish event ‚Üí exception‚ÜíDLQ. SIGTERM graceful (finishes current job). Redis-unavailable ‚Üí backoff retry.
- `dead_letter.py` ‚Äî DeadLetterQueue (Redis list elite_studio:dlq): move_to_dlq, list_failed, retry (re-enqueue via producer, new job_id), purge(>72h). Graceful no-Redis.
- `rate_limiter.py` ‚Äî ProviderRateLimiter sliding-window (sorted set, 60s): gemini 60/openai 500/anthropic 50 rpm. acquire(timeout)‚ÜíRateLimitExceeded. Graceful no-Redis = allow.
- `cost_tracker.py` ‚Äî CostTracker per-job Redis hash + timeline sorted set. PRICING_PER_1K (gemini 0.000075/openai 0.005/anthropic 0.003). record/get_job_cost/get_total_cost/estimate_cost. Graceful no-Redis.

### C12 synthesis/ ‚Äî FLUX 5-stage masked-inpaint pipeline (Stage 3 of three_d_agent; replaces single-pass Gemini RAS)
**Core innovation: binary mask in Stage 3 makes decoration drift PHYSICALLY impossible (not just unlikely).**
- `flux_pipeline.py` ‚Äî **render()** orchestrator: S1 FLUX Kontext Pro (clean base, NO decoration) ‚Üí S1.5 AuditFilter (H4 gate; if clean, ACCEPT, 0 Fill calls) ‚Üí S2 MaskDeriver (mask only violation regions, Path B) ‚Üí S3 FLUX Fill inpaint inside mask + S5 VisionAuditAgent audit, H4 retry loop (MAX_ATTEMPTS 3, guidance escalation). Budget-gated per stage. Returns RenderResult (ok/output_path/quarantine_path/audit_result/manifest H5 forensic). Quarantine on exhaustion.
- `clients/fal.py` ‚Äî **FalClient** async (AsyncClient.subscribe, queue progress). Exp-backoff retry transient only (4xx/validation fail fast). upload/upload_bytes/subscribe ‚Üí FalResult. FAL_KEY env.
- `stages/base_render.py` ‚Äî render_base (S1 Kontext, techflat‚Üísilhouette conditioning, decoration suppressed). _strict_budget_enabled gate. aspect 1:1 for mask alignment.
- `stages/mask_deriver.py` ‚Äî **MaskDeriver.derive**: parse dossier branding_block (regex BrandingEntry region/technique/color) ‚Üí DECORATION_TECHNIQUES filter ‚Üí Gemini Flash bbox (primary) OR STATIC_REGION_BOXES (fallback) ‚Üí rasterize binary mask. OverMaskError if coverage >0.4 (would near-regenerate). allowed_regions = Path B surgical. matches_view front/back prefix logic.
- `stages/decoration_inpaint.py` ‚Äî inpaint_decoration (S3): FLUX Fill Pro (or kontext-lora/inpaint if lora_url) inside mask. Guidance escalates per attempt (7.5/12/17). _compose_decoration_prompt (per-region physics + violation feedback + NEGATIVE contract).
- `stages/audit_filter.py` ‚Äî AuditFilter (S1.5 adapter to VisionAuditAgent): passed‚Üíaccept; else extract blocking (medium/high) violation_regions for surgical mask. AuditError on infra fail (fail-loud).
- `prompts/base_prompts.py` ‚Äî build_base_prompt (S1: garment_type_lock + view direction + "NO decoration" + NEGATIVE structural prohibitions).
- `prompts/decoration_prompts.py` ‚Äî **physics-described** technique language (TECHNIQUE_PHYSICS: describe mechanism not name ‚Äî fights data prior that "decoration=embroidery"). H3 double-negative: ONLY-positive + physics + TECHNIQUE_NEGATIVE_PREFIX + _TONAL_AMPLIFIER (embossed/debossed) + COLOR + UNIVERSAL_NEGATIVE_SUFFIX. build_violation_feedback = positive-only (never name violations ‚Äî diffusion has no negation).
- `state/telemetry.py` ‚Äî CostTracker (in-process, COST_USD per model, warns at $5/10/20/50 tiers, NO hard cap). log_stage structured.
- package __init__ files = trivial re-exports.

### C15 golden specs ‚Äî per-SKU canonical render contracts (`assets/golden/<sku>/placement.md`)
All `placement.md` AUTO-GENERATED from canonical sources (catalog CSV + dossier .md + logo-registry.json) by `scripts/scaffold_sku_asset_folders.py` ‚Äî "Edit those sources, not this file." All `CLAUDE.md` under golden = 43B empty claude-mem placeholders.
**Fixed structure each file:** (1) Branding spec one-line, (2) **Garment silhouette lock** (positive desc + NOT-X exclusions: NOT a jersey/hoodie/jacket/tee/tank‚Ä¶), (3) **Logo placements** (logo-id + position + technique + size), (4) Render scene context (Pose + Setting; Setting always "pure white studio backdrop, soft directional front-left lighting, drop shadow"), (5) **Do NOT render** (long negative block ‚Äî the real anti-hallucination payload).
**Logo-registry IDs in use:** `black-roses-cloud-cluster`, `red-roses-cloud-cluster`, `heart-rose-composite`, `love-hurts-full-lettering`, `sr-monogram-rose-gold`, `rose-gold-rose`, `skyy-rose-collection-circular-patch`. Techniques: embossed/debossed/embroidered/silicone_patch/silicone_cut_out/sublimated/stitched/tackle_twill_cut_out/circular_patch/leather_emboss.
**COLORWAY-OVERRIDE rule (cross-cutting, the #1 hallucination axis):** rose-cluster color is remapped per collection/SKU, NOT canonical by default:
  - Black Rose ‚Üí TONAL GREYSCALE (grey roses, GREY stems NOT kelly-green, white cloud NOT blue). Kelly-green only on techniques preserving full color (silicone appliqu√©/screen-print), e.g. br-002 front patch.
  - Love Hurts ‚Üí CANONICAL FULL COLOR (red roses + green stems + white-blue cloud). lh-003/lh-004 inside-hood use `red-roses-cloud-cluster` (re-corrected 2026-05-27: the 2026-05-25 switch to heart-rose-composite was WRONG). heart-rose-composite reserved for lh-004 back-center, lh-005 Fannie i-dot, lh-002/lh-006 joggers left-thigh.
  - Signature Bridge series shirts ‚Üí recolored: sg-005 Bay Bridge=BLUE/CYAN rose; sg-002 Stay Golden=PURPLE/VIOLET rose. Bridge SHORTS (sg-001 Bay daytime-blue / sg-003 Golden Gate sunset-purple) = photographic sublimated bridge print ONLY, no rose layered on body.
  - Signature Mint&Lavender (sg-006 hoodie / sg-013 crewneck / sg-014 pants / sg-015 windbreaker) ‚Üí PINK/LAVENDER-tonal rose.
  - br-007 (BR√óLH collab shorts) ‚Üí ALL logos remapped to tonal black/grey/white/cream/peach (no red, no canonical color).
**Per-SKU distinctions worth noting (silhouette confusion traps):**
  - br-001 Crewneck: WHITE ribbed trim, embossed 3-color front cloud, SR monogram BACK-NECK only. br-002 Joggers: white ribbed trim, silicone patch LEFT-thigh front + SR back-right hip. br-004 Hoodie: TONAL-BLACK ribbing (no white trim), embroidered chest, back CLEAN. br-005 Signature Hoodie: lighter polyester, WHITE drawstrings, right-chest silicone SR + LEFT-side-body embroidered rose, sublimated-rose INNER-HOOD lining only.
  - sg-006 hoodie = ZIP-UP, white body + PINK hood + rainbow chevron. sg-013 crewneck = solid MINT body, NO chevron, NO hood, NO zip (inverse of sg-006). sg-014 pants = white + chevron (fleece). sg-015 windbreaker SET = NYLON (not fleece), white+pink-hood+chevron, jacket+pants, back-yoke LARGE SR monogram. Catalog "Black" field is WRONG for sg-015 ‚Äî render techflat white colorway.
  - sg-009 Sherpa: black nylon EXTERIOR shell, white sherpa INTERIOR lining only (NOT sherpa-exterior), stand-up collar NOT hood, red rose chest.
  - sg-011/sg-012 Label Tees: minimal, small left-chest SR monogram only (sg-011 white-on-white tonal; sg-012 orchid body + rose-gold thread). sg-011 has NO logo placements registered.
  - sg-007 Beanie: black knit, 4 rose colorway variants (red/grey/black/purple), silicone patch slightly-off-left front cuff. lh-005 Fannie: black FAUX-leather fanny pack (accessory), "FANNIE" white wordmark + heart-rose at i-dot.
  - kids-001/002: two-piece set (hoodie+pants) ONE SKU, DIAGONAL color-block, BLACK ROSE (MLB-style) Authentic Collection patch on right arm, greyscale rose. kids-001 Red/Black (black pants); kids-002 Purple/Black ‚Üí pants actually DEEP PURPLE despite name.
  - lh-002/lh-006 mirror joggers: lh-002 black body+white side-panel; lh-006 white body+black side-panel (vertical side-seam contrast, NOT stripe).
Universal negatives recurring across nearly all: NO Authentic Collection patch (reserved for BR jersey series), NO embossed/debossed unless specified, NO wordmark unless specified, contrast trim/drawstring color is load-bearing (white vs tonal-black is a frequent trap).

### C13 ventures/ ‚Äî productized verticals on one Elite Studio surface
Canon: EVERY creative pipeline runs through Elite Studio (single operator surface). Each vertical = a "venture" composing existing agents + orchestration. Per-venture layout: `__init__`(MANIFEST+Pipeline)/`__main__`/`config`/`state`/`pipeline`(build_pipeline‚Üícompiled LangGraph)/`agents`(AgentBinding registry)/`cli`(info/agents/status/smoke)/`README`/`tests/test_smoke`.
- `_base.py` ‚Äî primitives: **VentureStatus** StrEnum (stable/beta/alpha/planned), **AgentBinding** (frozen: name/import_path/role/ready=False; `.resolve()` importlib imports the class ‚Äî verified real at scaffold time, not stubs), **VentureManifest** (frozen: slug/title/summary/status/agent_bindings/default_models/notes; `agents_by_role`), **VentureState** TypedDict (sku/inputs/outputs/status/errors ‚Äî shared envelope ventures extend), **PipelineResult** (frozen: venture/status/nodes_executed/final_state), **VenturePipeline** Protocol (manifest/build/run_smoke/list_agents).
- `__init__.py` ‚Äî registry SoT. **IMAGERY_MANIFEST** (imagery = original top-level pipeline, status STABLE, NOT duplicated to ventures/imagery/ to avoid abstraction collision). `_VENTURE_LOADERS` lazy dict: imagery/photo/threed/video/social. list_ventures/get_manifest(KeyError unknown)/all_manifests. **`ready` flag = wiring status (honest no-stub), NOT "fires unconditionally".**
- **photo** (BETA, scaffold-only) ‚Äî single `initialize` node graph. 5 agents, only PhotographyDirector ready=True. Roadmap: wire prompt_enrich/scene_audit/render/qc_gate/retouch/upload.
- **social** (BETA, DEEP-WIRED) ‚Äî 5-node graph: plan‚Üígenerate_posts‚Üícompose_graphics‚Üístrategize‚Üíassemble. `generate_posts` LIVE every pass (real `agents.social_media_agent.SocialMediaAgent`, free template-based, NO paid call). `compose_graphics` (CreativeAgent paid image) + `strategize` (MarketingAgent LLM) COST-GATED behind `generate_graphics`/`run_strategy` state flags (default False ‚Üí smoke/tests free). SUPPORTED_PLATFORMS=instagram/tiktok/twitter/facebook. All 3 agents ready=True (wired, gate governs invocation). smoke_sku br-001. Skills: `.claude/skills/skyyrose-social-*` + skyyrose-content-engine hub.
- **threed** (BETA, DEEP-WIRED, TRELLIS-only/self-hosted) ‚Äî OWNS the engine (no SaaS round-trip): `microsoft/TRELLIS.2-4B` in isolated `trellis2` conda env via `agents.trellis_agent.TrellisAgent`. Graph: plan‚Üíverify_capability‚Üígenerate‚Üíselect‚Üíassemble. **`verify_capability` FREE every pass** = "proven endpoints" readiness proof (conda python resolvable, TRELLIS.2 repo dir present, model repo configured, output dir writable via probe, dossier resolvable for SKU) ‚Äî NOT "is a key set". **`generate` COMPUTE-GATED** behind `generate_3d` (default False; heavy GPU/minutes). `_generation_blocker` order: compute-gate ‚Üí readiness (ready_to_generate) ‚Üí source_image; honest hard-states (engine_unavailable/missing_input, NO silent SaaS fallback). Tripo/Meshy ready=False legacy registered, NOT invoked. ThreeDRoundTable/ThreeDAgent also ready=False.
  - `service.py` ‚Äî tenant-scoped replica path: **run_replica** (generate_fn ‚Üí fidelity gate evaluate_fn ‚Üí ApprovalQueue.enqueue). Verdict routing: REJECT ‚Üí bounded regen (FIXED threshold across attempts, honest because front has ground truth; exhaust ‚Üí status 'rejected', never auto-ship best-of-failed); HUMAN_QUEUE/PASS_PENDING_HUMAN ‚Üí queued_for_human. Delivery to canonical tree only AFTER human approve (separate step). `_trellis_generate_fn` bridges async TrellisAgent.image_to_3d via dedicated ThreadPoolExecutor worker (never asyncio.run on live loop). `default_replica_runner` resolved lazily by `platform.service.generate_3d` (= the ReplicaRunner injected in C8).
- **video** (ALPHA, scaffold-only, least-wired) ‚Äî single `initialize` node. 2 agents (AniGenAgent root, TryOnAgent ES) both ready=False. Default 9:16 vertical 1080√ó1920, 5s, 24fps. Roadmap: storyboard/frame_gen/tryon_video/audio_bed/encode/upload + FASHN-video/Runway/Pika/Sora.
- All pipelines lazy-import langgraph (package introspectable on thin env, matches creative.checkpointer pattern). All run_smoke invoke with `langfuse_config()`. CLIs uniform (threed adds `verify`).

### C14 tests/ ‚Äî behavioral contracts (confirm C0‚ÄìC12 source; net-new invariants below)
- `conftest.py` ‚Äî model factories (make_product/vision_analysis/synthesized_vision/generation_result/quality_verification/production_result) + silent_coordinator fixture + LIVE catalog fixtures (reads canonical CSV at `wordpress-theme/skyyrose-flagship/data/skyyrose-catalog.csv`, session-scoped). Env override knobs surfaced across tests: `SKYYROSE_CATALOG_PATH`, `SKYYROSE_BRAND_PATH`, `SKYYROSE_PROMPTS_PATH`, `SKYYROSE_MASTER_MANIFEST_PATH`, `COMPOSITOR_TELEMETRY_DIR`, `ELITE_STUDIO_STRICT_BUDGET`.
- **DualVisionGate** (test_dual_vision_gate): VisionAgent IS DualVisionGate (alias). verify_reference = AND-consensus (either A or B "NO:" ‚Üí passed=False, blocking_reason carries the NO text). analyze() wraps ‚Üí SynthesizedVision.
- **QualityAgent** (ghost_mannequin_qa): pass = min(A,B)‚â•80 AND no identity-mismatch; either model flagging IDENTITY_MISMATCH ‚Üí auto-reject regardless of score ‚Üí recommendation="regenerate".
- **config** (test_config) CONFIRMED model IDs: VISION_GEMINI=gemini-3-flash-preview, VISION_OPENAI=gpt-4o, GENERATION_MODEL=gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview (Nano Banana 2, default; 3:4), NANO_BANANA_PRO=gemini-3-pro-image-preview, QC_MODEL=gpt-4o. Lazy clients lru_cached.
- **Coordinator** (test_coordinator): QC failure does NOT fail production (image still made ‚Üí status success, quality.success=False). generate(sku,view,generation_spec). BATCH_REPORT.json. skip_existing.
- **catalog** (test_catalog/_validation/_consistency): structural validators (status‚àà{draft,pre-order,retired,...}, hex 6-digit, price‚â•0, master.source‚àà{pending,photograph,cad_render,3d_model,generative_locked}, sku lowercase-dash allowing br-d01). Referential violation codes: series_unknown_sku, unknown_collection, alias_collision, patch_sku_missing, patch_sport_invalid. strict‚ÜíIntegrityError. SeriesEntry+products_in_series. resolve_sku via alias. **8 jersey SKUs: br-003 + br-008..br-012 + br-014..br-015 (br-013 retired)**. jersey_patch_for: br-014/015‚Üíbaseball, br-010‚Üíbasketball, br-011‚Üíhockey.
- **logo_registry** (test_logo_registry) ‚Äî AUTHORITATIVE jersey patch map (registry v4, brand_primary=sr-monogram-rose-gold): br-008‚Üínfl-authentic-collection-card / folder `black-is-beautiful-football-jersey-red`; br-009‚Üínfl / `...-white`; br-010‚Üínba-authentic-collection-card / `...-basketball-jersey`; br-011‚Üíhockey-championship-card / `...-hockey-jersey`; br-003‚Üímlb-authentic-collection-card / `black-is-beautiful-jersey`; br-012‚Üímlb / `jersey-last-oakland-baseball`; br-014‚Üímlb / `...-jersey-giants`; br-015‚Üímlb / `...-jersey-white`. Exactly 4 MLB jerseys (br-003/012/014/015), 4 sport patches (nfl/nba/mlb/hockey, all co_located_per_sku, category sport_patch). Logo collection assignment: black-roses-cloud-cluster=black_rose (centralized); **red-roses-cloud-cluster=signature** (sg-009 sherpa canonical home); heart-rose-composite=love_hurts.
- **‚úÖ RESOLVED (2026-06-06) ‚Äî was a STALE TEST, not a source conflict.** Canonical sources ALL agree at v5 (2026-05-27, commit `fix(catalog): correct Love Hurts logo canon`): logo-registry.json v5 + both dossiers (love-hurts-basketball-shorts.md, love-hurts-bomber-jacket.md) + golden placement.md ‚Üí lh-003 uses `red-roses-cloud-cluster` (all_over + mesh_side_panels); lh-004 uses `red-roses-cloud-cluster` (inside_hood) + `heart-rose-composite` (back_center); logo home collection = `shared_signature_love_hurts`. The contradiction lived ONLY in `tests/test_logo_registry.py`, which still encoded the reverted v4 (2026-05-25) state (last touched in the v4 commit, never updated after the v5 revert) ‚Äî 3 tests failed against canon. FIXED: updated test_red_rose_is_shared_signature_love_hurts_collection / test_lh003_uses_red_rose_not_heart_rose / test_lh004_uses_red_rose_inside_hood_and_heart_rose_back to v5 canon. Full suite green (24 passed). Logged `.wolf/buglog.json` bug-108. **Authoritative rule: red-roses-cloud-cluster IS the Love Hurts rose variant; heart-rose-composite reserved for lh-004 back-center, lh-005 Fannie i-dot, LH joggers left-thigh.**
- **master_registry** (test_master_registry[_pending]): sha256_of_file ‚Üí "sha256:" prefix; Manifest register/register_pending(no file)/lock(pending‚Üílocked, rejects "pending" as source, requires existing pending)/verify(False for pending+tamper, True after lock)/require(KeyError)/save (atomic, no .tmp leftover). alpha_hash separate. version=1.
- **prompts** (test_prompts) PromptLibrary: registry.yaml SoT, id format `component.name.vN`, status production/retired/candidate, production_since required when production, variables‚Üîplaceholders BIDIRECTIONAL (undeclared placeholder AND unused declared both raise), render() strict (MissingVariableError for both missing+extra), referential code prompt_component_missing, strict‚ÜíIntegrityError. live_prompts/retired_prompts/by_component/is_live.
- **telemetry** (test_telemetry): new_run_id 12-alnum, hash_inputs 16-hex (deterministic, skips None), stage() ctx-mgr emits ok/error event (reraises on error, error_type captured, freeform kwargs‚Üímeta), STAGE_NAMES=(alpha,prompt,relight,flux,shadows,qa), dated UTC jsonl, emit never raises.
- **validation** (test_validation): validate_hex_color (6-digit only), validate_enum, validate_sku_format (lowercase+dash, allows br-d01), validate_not_empty, validate_non_negative, validate_iso_date(allow_null), collect_duplicates(sorted), Violation.format `[category:code]`, IntegrityError aggregates.
- **human_review** (test_human_review): _map_status (approved‚Üíapprove, rejected‚Üíreject, pending/revision_requested/unknown‚Üípending, expired‚Üítimeout). FAIL-SAFE: queue unavailable‚Üí"auto-approve:<job>" sentinel‚Üíapprove; poll error‚Üíapprove; timeout‚Üídecision="timeout".
- **ml_classifier** (test_quality_classifier): _CANDIDATE_LABELS (high quality fashion photo / low quality blurry photo / inappropriate content), _LABEL_SCORES (inappropriate=0.0, high>low), no transformers‚Üíuncertain 0.5/0.3.
- **graph** (test_graph_*): create_initial_state defaults (view=front, status=running, enable_compositor=False, retry_count=0, max_retries=2, unique workflow_id). after_quality: regenerate+retries‚Üígenerator, exhausted‚Üícompositor|finalize. after_quality_v2 (L4): low classifier conf + enable_human_review + not-yet-reviewed‚Üíhuman_review. quality_node: classifier conf‚â•0.8 skips LLM QC. tryon_node calls `execute_tryon(garment_image_path,model_image_path,category,garment_sku)`, skips silently (no gen/failed gen/no garment img). build_graph topology: enable_3d swaps generator‚Üíthree_d (no dead nodes); enable_tryon adds tryon node; core always {vision,generator,quality,compositor,finalize}.
- **vision_test_registry** (scripts/, test_vision_test_registry): gather_images skips _references/hidden/non-image; combined_score strategies veto(inf on any fail)/weighted/color-only; ranks candidate images against master color+text spec; collection_filter; skips locked masters.
- venture test_smoke (4): confirm registration + langgraph compile + smoke run + every AgentBinding.resolve() imports a real target; threed asserts TrellisAgent is the ONLY ready engine (Tripo/Meshy ready=False); social asserts free publisher yields ‚â•1 real post with caption + cost gates report "not_requested".
